name: Sikkim Darjeeling Tour
overview: Explore the best of Darjeeling, Gangtok with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Arrive NJP Railway Station/Bagdogra Airport To Gangtok
itinerary.description: Arrive NJP Railway Station/Bagdogra Airport To Gangtok. Meet and greet on arrival & transfer to Gangtok(5500 FT.) the capital of Sikkim – The land of the Pristine and un-spoilt natural beauty with alpine landscapes and thick luxuriant forests,River and peaceful lakes. Evening free for own activities. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: After breakfast excursion to Tsomogo Lake(Departure at 9;00 to 9;30 AM) – Situat
itinerary.description: After breakfast excursion to Tsomogo Lake(Departure at 9;00 to 9;30 AM) – Situated at a height of 3,780 Mts. with an average depth of 50 Ft. and Baba Mandir – The shrine maid in memory of sepoy Harbahajan Singh,Back to Gangtok. Evening free . Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: After breakfast start for half day sightseeing covering Jhakri Water Falls, Rank
itinerary.description: After breakfast start for half day sightseeing covering Jhakri Water Falls, Ranka Monastery, Research of Tibetology(Close on Sunday and Government Holidays). Do-Drul Chorten, Directorate of Handloom(Close on Sunday and Govt. Holidays), Flower Show. Afternoon transfer to Pelling. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: After breakfast sightseeing includes Rimbi Waterfalls, Rock Garden,Khecheopalri
itinerary.description: After breakfast sightseeing includes Rimbi Waterfalls, Rock Garden,Khecheopalri Lake and Darap Village, Kanchenjunga Water Falls, Pemayangtse Monestery, Rabdentse Ruins. New Helipad and Kanchenjunga View Tower. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: After breakfast Pelling Bagdogra Airport/NJP Railway Station
itinerary.description:
After breakfast Pelling Bagdogra Airport/NJP Railway Station.
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
Inclusions
Accommodation in well-appointed rooms for 03 nights
Meals
Welcome drink at hotel
All transfers & sightseeing as per itinerary using Private Vehicle with driver (Vehicle will not be on disposal)
Driver’s allowance
Toll tax. Parking, State tax. permit
Exclusions
Route Diversion cost Due to Natural calamities (Land Slide / Road Blockage) / Political Disturbance.
Anything not mentio

itinerary.title: IXB to Gangtok (120 kms
itinerary.description: IXB to Gangtok (120 kms. 4,5 hrs. approx.): Upon your arrival at Bagdogra Airport, you will have an assisted transfer to Gangtok. Complete the check-in formalities at the hotel. The rest of the day is free at leisure. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Gangtok sightseeing: After breakfast, proceed for a day trip to Tsomgo Lake
itinerary.description: Gangtok sightseeing: After breakfast, proceed for a day trip to Tsomgo Lake. Also known as Changu Lake, this glacial lake is a popular tourist attraction and is located on the road towards the Nathu La pass. The next visit is to Baba Mandir. This shrine is built in the memory of a brave Indian soldier, Harbhajan Singh, who died during the war near the Nathu La Pass. Return to Gangtok. The evening is free for shopping activities. Overnight stay at the hotel. Optional tour to Nathula Pass (Alt 140

itinerary.title: Gangtok to Darjeeling (115 kms
itinerary.description: Gangtok to Darjeeling (115 kms. 4 hrs. approx.): After breakfast, proceed for a half-day sightseeing tour of Gangtok covering Banjhakri Falls, Cottage Industry and Handicraft Center, Flower show, Dro-dul Chorten & Institute of Tibetology. Afternoon drive to Darjeeling (7,100 ft.). On arrival, check in to your hotel. Overnight stay at Darjeeling.

itinerary.title: Darjeeling sightseeing: Early morning, leave to view the sunrise at Tiger Hill
itinerary.description:
Darjeeling sightseeing: Early morning, leave to view the sunrise at Tiger Hill. This is a major attraction amongst the tourists. After breakfast, visit Padmaja Naidu Zoological Park (Closed on Thursday), Himalayan Mountaineering Institute (Closed on Thursday), and Tea garden in the undulating valleys to view the scenic landscape of tea plucking and processing.
                    Visit Ghoom Monastery & Batasia Loop. Also, visit the Japanese Temple dedicated to Lord Buddha and constructed in 197

itinerary.title: Darjeeling to IXB Airport (80 kms
itinerary.description:
Darjeeling to IXB Airport (80 kms. 3 hrs. approx.): After breakfast, check out from the hotel and transfer to Airport to connect the flight to the onward destination.
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
Inclusions
Accommodation in well-appointed rooms for 03 nights

Route Diversion
